title: Scope
doc_html:
CHAPTER 1

GENERAL PROVISIONS

Art. 101.  Scope

This Code governs proceedings in the courts of Louisiana to the extent and with the exceptions stated in Article 1101.

Acts 1988, No. 515, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1989.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 1
GENERAL PROVISIONS
Art. 101.  Scope
This Code governs proceedings in the courts of Louisiana to the extent and with the exceptions stated in Article 1101.
Acts 1988, No. 515, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1989.
